allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source; Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path ''C:\\'', ''C:\\Program Files'', ''C:\\Program Files \(x86\)'', $env:APPDATA, $env:LOCALAPPDATA -Filter ''node.exe'' -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 3 | Select-Object -First 5 FullName")
